{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Samara’s halo
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Samara’s halo]] is a construction of [[light aura]] created by an expert centuries ago.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c12">''Unsouled'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Samara]]'s halo provides a harsh light.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c18">''Unsouled'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
